purpose: Versioned physics interpretation of Route-E dynamics ledgers. A script exit code or ledger all_pass value is mechanical evidence only and MUST NOT promote these statuses.

excluded_optional_lanes.reason: Optional UV-origin lane; it is not one of the 19 recovered required scripts and is not missing dynamics evidence.

dyn-0.supported_scope: Conventions, history inventory, and replay scaffolding only.
dyn-0.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass certifies the declared inventory/replay checks, not a dynamics result.

dyn-1a.supported_scope: Specified SUSY CMSGUT vacuum branch and transcribed Goldstone/spectrum benchmark.
dyn-1a.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass is conditional on the imported action, branch, conventions, and literature mass formulas.

blockers.description: Not an independent full-action Hessian derivation of the complete spectrum.

dyn-1b.supported_scope: Complete 472-state census within the transcribed CMSGUT sector formulas and benchmark.
dyn-1b.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass closes the conditional census, not the model class.

blockers.description: Requires an independent normalized-action Hessian and representation census.

dyn-2.supported_scope: Threshold and unification scan for the declared SUSY spectrum slice.
dyn-2.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass checks the implemented running and benchmark compatibility point only.

blockers.description: Full uncertainty propagation and branch-wide threshold treatment remain open.

dyn-2b.supported_scope: No living point in the preregistered finite (x, eta, M_S) SUSY benchmark slice.
dyn-2b.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass supports a finite-scan no-go only; it is not a model-class theorem.

blockers.description: The exclusion is branch-, prior-, range-, and threshold-dependent.

dyn-3.supported_scope: Dimension-five proton-decay order estimate on the declared SUSY benchmark.
dyn-3.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass validates the implemented scaling chain, not a complete physical amplitude.

blockers.description: Physical flavor rotations, explicit dressing, and a full uncertainty budget are incomplete.

dyn-4a.supported_scope: Inverse-seesaw benchmark reconstruction and a converged connected-local conditional zeta profile likelihood.
dyn-4a.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass validates the needle-basin local stencil, profile-root refinement, and Hessian cross-check, but does not prove a global minimum, disconnected-component completeness, a prediction, or a normalized Bayesian posterior.

resolved_issues.description: The former fixed-coordinate, under-resolved slice was replaced by a joint (q, phi) candidate fit and connected-local nuisance-minimized Delta-chi2=1 profiles with root-refinement, local-stencil, and Hessian checks.

blockers.description: The result remains conditional on the frozen benchmark Dirac sector, fixed normal ordering and m1, and a diagonal-Gaussian NuFit summary; a covariant global flavor fit remains open.
Only the connected needle-like basin around the reproducible candidate is profiled; no global-minimum or disconnected-component completeness claim is made.

dyn-4b.supported_scope: Conditional inverse-seesaw zeta distribution under the stated Dirac kernel and nuisance priors.
dyn-4b.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass does not justify the word unconditional.

blockers.description: Depends on the archival Dirac and charged-lepton kernels, normal ordering, v_u, and chosen nuisance priors.

dyn-4c.supported_scope: Kernel perturbation and algebraic inverse-seesaw reconstruction study.
dyn-4c.arithmetic_interpretation: Exact absorption is largely the identity M_R = -m_D^T m_nu^-1 m_D, not an independent global flavor prediction.

blockers.description: A covariant Spin(10) Yukawa sum-rule fit with identifiability and rank-deficient cases remains open.

dyn-5.supported_scope: Arithmetic replay of the currently coded messenger formulas only.
dyn-5.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass MUST NOT be interpreted as a valid one-loop messenger calculation.

blockers.description: The displayed quadratic X-N mass mixing does not generate the asserted Yukawa anomalous dimension; specify an explicit trilinear or gauge interaction and rederive matching.
Tree-level kinetic matching gives delta Z = |zeta|/3 and must be included before any loop claim.
The displayed charges do not forbid X L H_u.

dyn-5v.supported_scope: Fail-closed model-validity guard for the displayed quadratic N-X messenger system, including tree Kahler matching and full 6x6 Schur-complement identities.
dyn-5v.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass validates the counter-diagnostics and matching identities; it deliberately confirms that the historical one-loop physics claim remains invalid.

blockers.description: Supply an anomaly-consistent charged trilinear or gauge interaction before any loop anomalous dimension can be calculated.
The displayed additive Abelian charges still allow X L H_u.

dyn-7.supported_scope: Unflavored thermal-leptogenesis order estimate on the conditional zeta sample.
dyn-7.arithmetic_interpretation: The legacy arithmetic ledger may replay, but the independent flavor-regime gate blocks physical promotion until branch-local thermal inputs exist.

blockers.description: Specify the active branch, charged-lepton equilibration temperatures, spectator matrix, reaction densities, initial conditions, and reheating assumptions.
M1 is about 2.4e10 GeV, in the tau-resolved regime; rerun at least two-flavor Boltzmann, preferably density-matrix evolution with spectator effects.

dyn-7f.supported_scope: Fail-closed flavor-regime classifier and Davidson-Ibarra consistency repair for DYN-7 and DYN-9b-3.
dyn-7f.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass validates the regime diagnosis and the reason for blocking; it does not validate a leptogenesis posterior.

blockers.description: DYN-7 requires the SUSY-branch tan beta, charged-lepton rates, spectator matrix, initial conditions, and reheating history.
DYN-9b-3 requires at least two-flavor Boltzmann evolution, preferably a density-matrix treatment with branch-local rates.

dyn-9.supported_scope: One-loop non-SUSY intermediate-scale ESH branch scan.
dyn-9.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass is a structural branch diagnostic, not a complete non-SUSY theory.

blockers.description: The full non-SUSY scalar potential, vacuum, two-loop running, and threshold spectrum are not closed.

dyn-9b-1.supported_scope: Little-group bookkeeping and ESH threshold sensitivity.
dyn-9b-1.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass does not establish a dynamical vacuum or complete survivor spectrum.

blockers.description: Explicit quartic descent and full stability analysis are delegated downstream.

dyn-9b-1b.supported_scope: Exploratory explicit-210 tensor and fixed-slice quartic scan.
dyn-9b-1b.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass is local to the sampled tree-level measure and invariant basis.

blockers.description: Fixed-ratio and finite random sampling do not prove a global vacuum statement.

dyn-9b-1c.supported_scope: Tree-level epsilon and selected 126bar mixed-quartic scan.
dyn-9b-1c.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass covers the implemented invariant subset only.

blockers.description: Self-quartics, epsilon-mixed patterns, loop stabilization, and global-minimum tests remain incomplete.

dyn-9b-1d.supported_scope: Rare sampled local left-right positive points after freeing the vev ratio.
dyn-9b-1d.arithmetic_interpretation: all_pass and a nonzero hit count show sampled existence only, not a global vacuum theorem.

blockers.description: Add confidence intervals, prior/measure sensitivity, competing vacua, and a global or metastability analysis.

dyn-9b-2.supported_scope: Fixed-archival-kernel ceiling estimates, an explicitly optional top-like benchmark, exact zeta invariance for uniform positive-real rescaling, and complex-rescaling phase covariance.
dyn-9b-2.arithmetic_interpretation: RE-SC3 is now present, but all_pass does not turn the fixed-shape rescaling exercise into a non-SUSY Spin(10) flavor refit; Y_nu=h-3f and Y_u=h+f do not by themselves force Y_nu to be top-like.

resolved_issues.description: The instanton Majorana-pricing ledger is present and hash-tracked; it remains an unpromoted pricing card.
The one-loop SM running now uses the already SU(5)-normalised g1=0.462 with b1=41/10, rather than multiplying by sqrt(5/3) twice.

The former SO(10) lock wording is replaced by an algebraic h=3f counterexample plus an optional top-like ansatz. Exact complex-zeta invariance is restricted to uniform positive-real rescaling; complex rescaling rotates zeta by y^2/|y|^2.

blockers.description: Perform a branch-local covariant Spin(10) fit to charged fermions, CKM, PMNS and neutrino masses; the current ledger explicitly reports full_nonsusy_yukawa_fit_performed=false.
Replace SM-only running through intermediate thresholds and the M_Delta=M_X estimate by branch-specific RGEs, doublet mixing, and threshold matching.

dyn-9b-3.supported_scope: Corrected unflavored non-SUSY leptogenesis order estimate with the SM loop function and Davidson-Ibarra normalization.
dyn-9b-3.arithmetic_interpretation: The double-square-root error is repaired, but all_pass remains non-publishable because M1 is in the tau-resolved regime and the upstream flavor fit is preliminary.

blockers.description: The heavy-neutrino and Yukawa inputs must come from the missing branch-local non-SUSY global flavor fit rather than a fixed archival kernel.
Replace the unflavored calculation by a branch-local flavored Boltzmann or density-matrix treatment.
The same active-branch thermal inputs required by the DYN-7 flavor-regime gate must be supplied before DYN-9b-3 can be promoted.

dyn-8.supported_scope: Fail-closed chain-of-custody and falsifiability/status collector only.
dyn-8.arithmetic_interpretation: RE-SC3/4/5 are present and the 210-versus-45 branch-map contradiction is repaired. Mechanical all_pass certifies disclosure checks only; physics_promotion_allowed remains false.

blockers.description: DYN-5V and DYN-7F prevent DYN-5 and unflavored DYN-7/9b-3 diagnostics from being promoted merely because their arithmetic ledgers report all_pass.
DYN-9b-2 remains a fixed-kernel scaling study rather than a global non-SUSY Spin(10) flavor fit.
RE-SC3/4/5 remain unpromoted pricing cards; the RE-SC4 numerical selectivity gap inherits the invalid DYN-5 ceiling.

RE-SC3.dependency_rule: conditionally required by DYN-9b-2 and DYN-8 when those lanes are selected

RE-SC4.dependency_rule: conditionally required by DYN-8 when selected
RE-SC4.known_limitation: The additive-Abelian no-go is valid, but the numerical selectivity gaps inherit invalid historical DYN-5 ceilings and are blocked pending messenger rederivation.

RE-SC5.dependency_rule: conditionally required by DYN-8 when selected
RE-SC5.known_limitation: The current one-loop toy scan lacks an experimental intermediate-scale floor, threshold/proton uncertainty envelopes, and an independent global root audit.
